ground_truth.title: The 10 Best Car Rental Companies in 2025 [Rates, Service, Loyalty, and More]
ground_truth.author: Amar Hussain
ground_truth.main_content: When it comes to renting a car, it can be daunting to choose which company to use. Many travelers will opt for what appears to be the cheapest base rate, but depending on your requirements, you may be stung with expensive extras such as damage waivers, car seats, or toll policies. If your search uncovers pretty comparable rates, you may want to consider a rental company with rave reviews for customer service or the slickest pick-up and return process. Regular renters will benefit from joining a loyalty program that offers the highest point earnings and lowest redemption rates for free rental days. We\'ve detailed 10 of the best car rental companies to help you decide which one is right for you. Best for the Cheapest Base Rates: Sixt rent a car. Best for Customer Service: National. Best for the Most Locations Throughout the U.S.: Enterprise Rent-A-Car. Best for Comfort and Quality of Vehicles: Sixt rent a car. Best for Prepaid Car Rentals: Avis. Best for the Most Rewarding Loyalty Program: Dollar Car Rental. Best for Avoiding Additional Fees: Enterprise. Best for the Slickest Return Process: Alamo Rent a Car. The article includes detailed reviews of Advantage Rent A Car, Alamo Rent a Car, Avis Car Rental, Budget Car Rental, Dollar Car Rental, Enterprise Rent-A-Car, Hertz, National Car Rental, Sixt rent a car, and Thrifty Car Rental. Each section covers loyalty programs, mobile apps, fees for optional extras, toll policies, and pros and cons. Final thoughts emphasize that choosing the best car rental company depends on individual requirements, with recommendations based on cost, customer service, and loyalty program benefits.
with: Top car rental companies include Avis, Enterprise, and Hertz, which are known for their wide vehicle selection, customer service, and loyalty programs.
Enterprise offers extensive locations and lower fees for extras, making it ideal for leisure and business travelers.
Hertz's Gold Plus Rewards program and National's Emerald Club provide benefits like faster service and car choice options.
According to the J.D. Power North America Rental Car Satisfaction Study 2024, National is the best car rental company, scoring 736 points on a 1,000-point scale.
With over 4,000 neighborhood and airport branch offices, Enterprise is the largest car rental company in the U.S.
